title: Add photo deletion and saved-photo gallery backup to Photo Scanner

requirements.text: Add a clear delete/trash icon control in the Photo Scanner for removing an unwanted photo from the current session (clears the selected image and resets editor state).

quotes: add a delete icon for unwanted photos and or a gallery back up for saved photos

acceptanceCriteria: When a photo is loaded in the Photo Scanner, a delete/trash icon is visible and accessible (keyboard + screen reader label).
Activating delete clears the current image, stops/close camera preview if applicable, resets zoom/rotation/enhance state, and returns the user to the capture/upload choices.
Delete action does not break the existing Download/New Photo flows.

requirements.text: Implement a saved-photo gallery/backup for the Photo Scanner that persists saved scans locally in the browser and allows users to view, re-open, and delete saved items.

quotes: add a delete icon for unwanted photos and or a gallery back up for saved photos

acceptanceCriteria: A user can save the current scan into a local gallery from the Photo Scanner UI (user-facing text in English).
Saved photos persist across page refreshes in the same browser (local backup).
The gallery displays saved photos as a thumbnail grid/list with timestamp (or human-readable date) and provides actions to: open/view a saved scan and delete a saved scan.
Deleting a saved scan removes it from the gallery immediately and it does not return after refresh.
If there are no saved photos, the gallery shows an empty state message in English.
The gallery works on mobile and desktop layouts (responsive).

requirements.text: Add a confirmation step for destructive deletes from the saved-photo gallery to reduce accidental data loss.

quotes: add a delete icon for unwanted photos and or a gallery back up for saved photos

acceptanceCriteria: Attempting to delete a saved photo prompts the user with a confirmation dialog or inline confirmation UI in English.
Confirm removes the saved photo; cancel leaves it unchanged.
The confirmation UI is accessible (focus trapped if modal; buttons reachable via keyboard).

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui (compose existing UI components instead).
Do not edit immutable hook files listed in SYSTEM_CONTEXT (e.g., frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts[x], frontend/src/main.tsx).
Keep all user-facing text in English.
nonGoals: Do not add third-party cloud backup, external databases, or external file storage for photos.
Do not add real-time sync across devices or accounts.
Do not change backend data models for pests/quizzes/guides as part of this request.
